meta.defaultTitle: Snake Online — Battle Royale Ular Multiplayer
meta.defaultDescription: Mainkan Snake Online: game .io multiplayer ular terbaik. Lawan ribuan pemain, koleksi skin langka, naiki peringkat global. Gratis di iOS, Android, dan Web.

home.title: Snake Online — Battle Royale Ular Multiplayer
home.description: Kalahkan ribuan pemain nyata secara real-time. 200+ skin legendaris. Gratis di iOS, Android, Web.

play.title: Mainkan Snake Online — Gratis di Browser
play.description: Langsung masuk ke arena. Tanpa instal, tanpa daftar. Pertarungan ular multiplayer real-time di browser kamu, gratis selamanya.

downloads.title: Unduh Snake Online — iOS, Android, Windows, Mac
downloads.description: Dapatkan Snake Online di setiap platform. Aplikasi native untuk iPhone, iPad, Android, Windows dan macOS. Cross-progress. Gratis selamanya.

snakes.title: Skin Ular — 200+ Karakter
snakes.description: Temukan lebih dari 200 skin ular buatan tangan dalam enam tingkat kelangkaan. Bendera, neon, mitos, dan legendaris untuk membuat ularmu unik.

gameRanking.title: Peringkat Global — Pemain Snake Online Terbaik
gameRanking.description: Peringkat global langsung pemain Snake Online terbaik dunia. Update tiap jam. Naiki papan peringkat dan klaim takhtamu.

community.title: Komunitas Snake Online — Bergabung dengan Bangsa Ular
community.description: 5 juta pemain. Discord, turnamen, kreator konten. Terhubung dengan komunitas Snake Online global dan bentuk masa depan arena.

news.title: Berita & Update — Patch Notes dan Cerita
news.description: Patch notes terbaru, skin baru, perubahan balance, cerita di balik layar, dan update developer dari studio Snake Online.

about.title: Tentang Snake Online Studio
about.description: Tim dan cerita di balik Snake Online — battle royale ular multiplayer yang dimainkan 5 juta orang di 180 negara.

contact.title: Kontak Snake Online — Pers, Kemitraan, Dukungan
contact.description: Hubungi tim Snake Online. Permintaan pers, kemitraan bisnis, laporan bug, atau sekadar menyapa — kami baca semua.

support.title: Dukungan Snake Online — Pusat Bantuan
support.description: Temukan jawaban pertanyaan umum, atasi masalah, pulihkan akunmu, atau hubungi dukungan langsung. Kami siap membantu.

hero.title:
The arena where snakes
become legends.
hero.subtitle: Outsmart thousands of real players in real time. Collect 200+ legendary skins. Conquer global leaderboards.

features.title:
Engineered for the
modern arena.
features.subtitle: Every system, every frame, every snake — designed to make you feel unstoppable.

items.title: Real-Time Multiplayer
items.description: Sub-100ms latency servers in 12 regions. Your reflexes are the only ceiling.

items.title: 200+ Legendary Skins
items.description: From neon serpents to mythic dragons. Collect, evolve, and flex your style.

items.title: Global Leaderboards
items.description: Compete in regional and worldwide rankings. Updated every hour.

items.title: Daily Tournaments
items.description: Free entry. Real prizes. New brackets every 24 hours.

items.title: Cross-Platform
items.description: One account. iOS, Android, Web. Your progress travels with you.

items.title: Friends & Clans
items.description: Build your crew. Squad up. Dominate together.

snakes.title: Meet the snakes.
snakes.subtitle: Hundreds of hand-crafted characters across six rarity tiers.

ranking.title: Global Leaderboard
ranking.subtitle: The best snake players in the world. Updated hourly.
ranking.empty: Rankings are warming up. Check back in a moment.

play.title: Pick your platform.
play.subtitle: Free forever. No download required for web.

community.title: Join the snake nation.
community.subtitle: 5 million players. One arena. Endless stories.

news.title: News & Updates
news.subtitle: Patch notes, lore, and behind-the-scenes from the studio.

about.title: Built by gamers, for gamers.
about.lead: Snake Online started as a love letter to the games we grew up with — and became the .io battle arena we always wanted to play.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.body: Make competitive multiplayer feel effortless on any device, in any language, anywhere on Earth.

items.title: Fair Play
items.body: Zero pay-to-win. Every skin is cosmetic. Skill decides the leaderboard.

items.title: Player First
items.body: We ship updates the community asks for — not the ones spreadsheets demand.

items.title: Performance
items.body: 60 FPS on a 5-year-old phone. Because lag is unacceptable.

contact.title: Get in touch.
contact.subtitle: Press, partnerships, or just a hello — we read everything.
contact.supportLink: Need help with the game? Visit Support →

support.title: Support Center
support.subtitle: Answers, guides, and a real human if you need one.

cta.bannerTitle: Your throne is one game away.

footer.tagline: The world's most-played snake battle arena.

preStart.title: Siap meliuk?
preStart.subtitle: Tekan tombolnya. Game terbuka layar penuh. Tanpa instal. Tanpa iklan di pertandingan pertama.

error.title: Versi web tidak bisa dimuat di sini
error.subtitle: Browser atau jaringanmu memblokir game yang disematkan. Buka di tab baru atau ambil aplikasi natifnya.
